Palvolve_EvolutionStone.Name: Evolution Stone
Palvolve_EvolutionStone.Description: A mysterious stone humming with life energy. Lets a bonded Pal evolve into a stronger related form once it has reached the required level.

Palvolve_AdaptionStone.Name: Adaptation Stone (Legacy)
Palvolve_AdaptionStone.Description: A shimmering stone attuned to elemental forces. No longer craftable - element-specific Adaptation Stones replace it, but existing stones still work as a wildcard.
